sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108979" key="u(popoliteu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποπολῑτ-εύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n108979.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make one's measures subservient to,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῖς ἐχθροῖς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.36</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
